title: campanula rotundifolia var. angustiflora
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. angustiflora, also known as the narrow-flowered bellflower, is a variety of flowering plant within the Campanula genus, characterized by its delicate blue-purple flowers and slender leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are beneficial in treating wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. The narrow-flowered bellflower is also valued for its calming effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for anxiety and insomnia.
